title: Host Optimization Report
description: This workflow generates a host optmization report and emails to the specified addresses.
guide:
# Host Optimization Report
Get recommendations on how to reduce cost and minimize risk by optimizing your hosts. This workflow queries Grail and provides data to Dynatrace Assist to get recommendations. These recommendations are then sent to email(s) of your choice.

# Setup
1. Change emails (`to`, `cc`, `bcc`) to be an array of strings, e.g.:
2. Test with a manual Run, by click the `Run` button.
3. If everything works as expected, change the [Trigger](?trigger=) to a schedule, e.g. Weekly, Daily, etc.


# More advanced interactions
Consider using our MCP server, [local](https://github.com/dynatrace-oss/dynatrace-mcp) or [remote](https://docs.dynatrace.com/docs/discover-dynatrace/platform/davis-ai/dynatrace-mcp ).

unused_hosts.name: unused_hosts

input.query:
timeseries { cpu_p90 = percentile(dt.host.cpu.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true), mem_p90 = percentile(dt.host.memory.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true) }, 
  union: TRUE, by: { dt.entity.host }, from: now()-30d, to: now()
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host.name = entityName(dt.entity.host), cpu_p90=round(cpu_p90), mem_p90=round(mem_p90)
| filter cpu_p90<10 and mem_p90<30
| fields Host = concat("[",dt.entity.host.name,"](https://","{{environment().id}}",".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Health&sort=healthIndicators%3Adescending&fullPageId=",dt.entity.host,"&timeframeStart=now%28%29-30d&timeframeEnd=now%28%29)"), `CPU (%)`=cpu_p90, `Memory (%)`=mem_p90

unused_hosts.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

host_utilization.name: host_utilization
host_utilization.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

input.subject: Host Optimization Report

host_report_prompt.name: host_report_prompt

input.prompt:
Provide a markdown report for the following use case:
## Optimize host sizing
If a user wants to optimize the size of their hosts, they generally have three goals:
1. Shutdown potentially unused hosts
2. Reduce over-provisioned hosts to save on cost
3. Increase the size of under-provisioned hosts to reduce risk

Be sure to provide an overview (including number of hosts per utilization) and any insights from the data provided. If possible give an estimated range of cost savings.
input.supplementary:
Use this analysis of p90 CPU and Memory for the past 30 days:
{{result("host_utilization")["records"]}}

host_report_prompt.description: Prompt the Dynatrace Intelligence generative AI

over_provisioned_hosts.name: over_provisioned_hosts

input.query:
timeseries { cpu_p90 = percentile(dt.host.cpu.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true), mem_p90 = percentile(dt.host.memory.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true) }, 
  union: TRUE, by: { dt.entity.host }, from: now()-30d, to: now()
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host.name = entityName(dt.entity.host), cpu_p90=round(cpu_p90), mem_p90=round(mem_p90)
| filter cpu_p90>80 and mem_p90<85
| fields Host = concat("[",dt.entity.host.name,"](https://","{{environment().id}}",".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Health&sort=healthIndicators%3Adescending&fullPageId=",dt.entity.host,"&timeframeStart=now%28%29-30d&timeframeEnd=now%28%29)"), `CPU (%)`=cpu_p90, `Memory (%)`=mem_p90

over_provisioned_hosts.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

under_provisioned_hosts.name: under_provisioned_hosts

input.query:
timeseries { cpu_p90 = percentile(dt.host.cpu.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true), mem_p90 = percentile(dt.host.memory.usage, 90, rollup:max, scalar: true) }, 
  union: TRUE, by: { dt.entity.host }, from: now()-30d, to: now()
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.host.name = entityName(dt.entity.host), cpu_p90=round(cpu_p90), mem_p90=round(mem_p90)
| filter cpu_p90<30 and mem_p90<50
| fields Host = concat("[",dt.entity.host.name,"](https://","{{environment().id}}",".apps.dynatrace.com/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Health&sort=healthIndicators%3Adescending&fullPageId=",dt.entity.host,"&timeframeStart=now%28%29-30d&timeframeEnd=now%28%29)"), `CPU (%)`=cpu_p90, `Memory (%)`=mem_p90

under_provisioned_hosts.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.
